subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O my God, that the ocean of Thy utterance hath surged amidst Thy servants and the fragrance of Thy mercy hath been wafted throughout Thy lands. I beseech Thee, O [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما ماج بحر بیانک بین عبادک و هاج عرف رحمتک فی بلادک اسئلک یا
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @pairs in creation; male and female; B and E; agent and patient, @praise and encouragement
